hook: Five signals from this week that most buyers completely missed

slides.sub: Condo volume, HDB resale momentum, rental softening, landed bids — and one angle most buyers never see.

slides.lead: Four asset classes moved this week — not all in the same direction.
slides.source: URA caveats · HDB resale portal · POV Guy analysis

slides.pre: CCR / RCR resale transactions, week ending Apr 24
slides.post: Strongest weekly resale print in CCR / RCR since Feb 2026 — buyers are back off the fence.

slides.title: Three shifts buyers missed this week

items.body: HDB resale COV is rising in mature estates — Bishan, Toa Payoh, Queenstown all saw above-valuation closes.
CCR condo sellers are blinking first: asking-to-transacted discounts narrowed to ~1.5%, tightest since Q3 2025.
Rental supply in OCR crossed 3-month supply — first time since mid-2024. Landlords negotiating again.

slides.source: HDB resale portal · URA · SRX · POV Guy analysis

slides.title: Districts with most resale condo activity
slides.source: URA caveats · 7-day est. · POV Guy analysis

slides.label: The signal under the signal
slides.punch: Rental yield compression usually precedes a price anchor reset — landlords who bought 2021–22 are now testing exits. That supply creates entry points for patient buyers who've been priced out.
slides.punch_bold: The softness you see in asking rents is a floor, not a trend.

slides.pre: OCR rental supply overhang — months of inventory
slides.post: First time OCR rental supply crossed 3 months since mid-2024 — landlords are conceding first month free or rent-free fit-out.
slides.source: SRX rental data · Apr 2026 est. · POV Guy analysis

slides.pre: Buying, selling, or holding this quarter?
slides.title: Let's map your
slides.sub: 30-min strategy call. No pitch — just the week's data, your numbers, and the angles most agents won't show you.

slides.title: Forward this to
slides.sub: If someone you know is weighing a move in condo, HDB, or rental right now — this is the week's briefing they need.

caption:
Five market signals this week — and most buyers only caught one. 📉

• Condo resale in CCR/RCR just hit its strongest weekly volume since Feb 2026
• OCR rental supply crossed 3 months — landlords are conceding for the first time since mid-2024
• HDB resale COV is rising in mature estates: Bishan, Toa Payoh, Queenstown all above valuation

The rental softness everyone is reading as bad news? For patient buyers, it's a landlord-exit window.

📅 Book a 30-min strategy call → povguy.sg/strategy-call
